articles.snippet: However, fellow Kick streamer Adin Ross did confirm that Clavicular was arrested. He clarified that it was not due to the alligator incident ... A video of Clavicular emptying his gun clip on an alligator in Florida has gone viral.
articles.extractedTitle: Clavicular arrested for shooting alligator? Fact-checking claims after Florida video goes viral | Hindustan Times
keyPoints: Braden Eric Peters, known as Clavicular, is a 20-year-old streamer popular for 'looksmaxxing'.
A video showing Clavicular shooting an alligator in the Florida Everglades went viral.
The viral footage sparked outrage and claims that Clavicular was arrested for shooting the alligator.
Florida law prohibits the use of baited hooks, gig-equipped bang sticks, or firearms to take alligators, except bang sticks used on attached alligators.

Shooting a dead alligator is also illegal in Florida and may be classified as a 3rd-degree felony with penalties up to 5 years imprisonment, $5,000 fine, and gear/boat seizure under FL Statute 379.409.
Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission (FWC) acknowledged the video and is investigating but has not issued any official charges or comments yet.
Contrary to rumors, Clavicular was not arrested for the alligator shooting incident.
Kick streamer Adin Ross confirmed Clavicular's arrest was unrelated to the alligator case, possibly linked to an altercation involving Clavicular's girlfriend Violet and Jenny Popach.

articles.extractedTitle: What really happened when Kick streamer Clavicular was forced to the ground and arrested live on stream? - The Times of India
keyPoints: Clavicular is a 19-year-old Kick streamer known for controversial content about looksmaxxing and ties to the "black pill" community.
On December 18, 2025, Clavicular was live streaming IRL in Miami when police forcibly stopped and arrested him live on stream.
Police ordered Clavicular and his group to get on the ground with hands behind their backs; they complied while streaming continued.
Clavicular was detained for approximately 45 minutes before being released with no violence-related charges announced.
This was not Clavicular's first police encounter during a live stream; a similar police stop occurred on December 3, 2025, involving him and fellow streamer Edmatthews.
Police advised Clavicular to notify local police stations before future public IRL streams to avoid misunderstandings or interventions.
After background checks showed no threats, Clavicular and his group were released and allowed to leave.
An additional incident involved Clavicular threatening a stream sniper with violence and using a homophobic slur during a live stream, causing further backlash.

articles.title: Fact check: Was Clavicular arrested after viral alligator shooting video? Here’s the truth - The Times of India
articles.snippet: Kick streamer Braden Eric Peters, known as Clavicular, went viral after a video showed him allegedly shooting an alligator multiple times in Florida's Everglades.
keyPoints: Kick streamer Braden Eric Peters, known as Clavicular, went viral after a video showed him allegedly shooting an alligator multiple times in Florida's Everglades.
The viral video sparked outrage and questions about the legality and morality of the act, especially given Florida's strict laws protecting wildlife.
No official confirmation exists that Clavicular was arrested related to the alligator shooting incident.
Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission (FWC) acknowledged the video and said they are investigating the incident.
Some reports and a fellow streamer, Adin Ross, claimed Clavicular was arrested, but this arrest may be unrelated to the alligator event.

articles.title: What really happened when Kick streamer Clavicular was forced to the ground and arrested live on stream? - The Times of India
articles.snippet: Clavicular is a 19-year-old Kick streamer known for controversial content related to looksmaxxing and the 'black pill' community.
keyPoints: Clavicular is a 19-year-old Kick streamer known for controversial content related to looksmaxxing and the 'black pill' community.
On December 18, 2025, in Miami, Clavicular was live streaming when police stopped him and his group mid-stream.
Police shouted commands like 'Put your hands up!.. Get down on the ground!' and the group complied by laying face down with hands behind their backs.
Clavicular was detained for about 45 minutes before release with no violence-related charges announced.
This was not the first police encounter on stream; a similar stop occurred on December 3, 2025, involving Clavicular and fellow streamer Edmatthews.

articles.title: Fact check: Was Clavicular arrested after viral alligator shooting video? Here’s the truth - The Times of India
articles.snippet: Kick streamer Braden 'Clavicular' Peters, aged 20, was shown in a viral video allegedly shooting an alligator multiple times in Florida's Everglades National Park.
keyPoints: Kick streamer Braden 'Clavicular' Peters, aged 20, was shown in a viral video allegedly shooting an alligator multiple times in Florida's Everglades National Park.
The viral clip incited public outrage and sparked questions about the legality and morality of the act.

Florida state law generally forbids using guns to kill alligators except in specific situations; unauthorized alligator activity can be a third-degree felony with penalties up to 5 years in prison, $5,000 fine, and seizure of gear or boat under FL Statute 379.409.

Authorities, specifically the Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission (FWC), acknowledged awareness of the video and are investigating the incident; no official confirmation of any arrest or legal action related to this event has been made.
Rumors circulated online claiming Clavicular was arrested immediately after the incident, causing his streaming subathon to stop, but these rumors lacked official confirmation.
